title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Godrej Properties

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Godrej Properties
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties:
Godrej Properties is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties!
